name: EmoStyle: Affective Conditioning of Style-Specialist Experts for Emotional Image Generation

description: arXiv:2607.10165v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Emotion-aware artistic image generation requires an image to match the input prompt, follow the specified artistic style, and convey the target emotion.
